2604.12391.title: Chain-of-Models Pre-Training: Rethinking Training Acceleration of Vision Foundation Models
2604.12391.paper_summary: In this paper, we present Chain-of-Models Pre-Training (CoM-PT), a novel performance-lossless training acceleration method for vision foundation models (VFMs). This approach fundamentally differs from existing acceleration methods in its core motivation: rather than optimizing each model individually, CoM-PT is designed to accelerate the training pipeline at the model family level, scaling efficiently as the model family expands. Specifically, CoM-PT establishes a pre-training sequence for the model family, arranged in ascending order of model size, called model chain. In this chain, only the smallest model undergoes standard individual pre-training, while the other models are efficiently trained through sequential inverse knowledge transfer from their smaller predecessors by jointly reusing the knowledge in the parameter space and the feature space. As a result, CoM-PT enables all models to achieve performance that is mostly superior to standard individual training while significantly reducing training cost, and this is extensively validated across 45 datasets spanning zero-shot and fine-tuning tasks. Notably, its efficient scaling property yields a remarkable phenomenon: training more models even results in higher efficiency. For instance, when pre-training on CC3M: i) given ViT-L as the largest model, progressively prepending smaller models to the model chain reduces computational complexity by up to 72%; ii) within a fixed model size range, as the VFM family scales across 3, 4, and 7 models, the acceleration ratio of CoM-PT exhibits a striking leap: from 4.13X to 5.68X and 7.09X. Since CoM-PT is naturally agnostic to specific pre-training paradigms, we open-source the code to spur further extensions in more computationally intensive scenarios, such as large language model pre-training.
2604.12391.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，我們提出了一種名為 Chain-of-Models Pre-Training (CoM-PT) 的新穎性能無損訓練加速方法，專為視覺基礎模型 (VFMs) 設計。這種方法在核心動機上與現有的加速方法根本不同：CoM-PT 的設計是為了在模型家族層面上加速訓練流程，而不是單獨優化每個模型，隨著模型家族的擴展而高效擴展。具體而言，CoM-PT 為模型家族建立了一個預訓練序列，根據模型大小以升序排列，稱為模型鏈。在這個鏈中，只有最小的模型經歷標準的單獨預訓練，而其他模型則通過從其較小的前身進行順序的逆知識轉移，通過共同重用參數空間和特徵空間中的知識來高效訓練。因此，CoM-PT 使所有模型的性能大多優於標準的單獨訓練，同時顯著降低訓練成本，這在涵蓋零樣本和微調任務的 45 個數據集上得到了廣泛驗證。值得注意的是，其高效擴展特性產生了一個顯著現象：訓練更多模型甚至會導致更高的效率。例如，在 CC3M 上進行預訓練時：i) 當 ViT-L 作為最大模型時，逐步將較小的模型添加到模型鏈中可將計算複雜度降低最多 72%；ii) 在固定的模型大小範圍內，隨著 VFM 家族擴展到 3、4 和 7 個模型，CoM-PT 的加速比顯示出驚人的躍升：從 4.13X 增加到 5.68X 和 7.09X。由於 CoM-PT 自然對特定的預訓練範式保持中立，我們開源了代碼，以促進在更計算密集的場景中進一步擴展，例如大型語言模型的預訓練。
2604.12391.author: Jiawei Fan et.al.
2604.12391.authors: Jiawei Fan, Shigeng Wang, Chao Li, Xiaolong Liu, Anbang Yao
